description: David Hoffman discusses his journey into the crypto space, the evolution of Bankless, and the role of grassroots media in crypto. He reflects on his early podcasting experiences and the importance of authentic debate in the crypto community.
topic_summary: In this episode, David Hoffman shares insights on the development of Bankless and the changing landscape of crypto media. He emphasizes the significance of grassroots organizations and the challenges faced by content creators in maintaining ethical standards while navigating sponsorships [t=321.74].
